### Privacy checklist:
- [ ] No external `fetch()` calls added
- [ ] No conversation text written to any storage
- [ ] No new manifest permissions requested
- [ ] No `eval()` or dynamic script creation
- [ ] If ONNX model changes: size budget checked (total < 200MB)

### Additional checkboxes:
- [ ] Does this change the evidence object schema? If yes: all consumers updated?
- [ ] Does this change counter-prompt selection logic? If yes: question-form verified?
- [ ] Tested on: Claude.ai / ChatGPT / Gemini
